text:
There once was a young girl named Lily who lived next door to an old bookshop. Every morning she'd visit, picking up forgotten novels. One particular autumn day she found an old diary of an ancient bibliophile.

The diary detailed tales from centuries past, of journeys to forgotten corners of the earth, and adventures lost in time. Lily would read until the moonlight painted her cheeks.

Then one rainy evening, as thunder boomed over the bookshop, Lily pressed a ring-shaped bookmark into the diary. In the dim light, its edges glowed faintly. She had discovered a secret treasure—a lost poem about a pirate queen who danced under the stars.

Weeks turned into months, her heart enchanted by the poetry. And when winter froze her feet one night, she heard a mysterious voice calling her name.

She opened the diary—and it wasn't empty.

Behind the pages lay a spellbound poem. As she read the lines, she felt her heart leap.

"Meet Princess Marina,
